member.name: T:Echoglossian.Echoglossian
member.summary: Provides DB and cache operations for canonical action/item/trait tooltip rows.
Defines operations for managing and retrieving translation data
Provides shared DB and cache operations for canonical reference-text rows.

Represents the Echoglossian plugin, which provides translation services and UI enhancements for Dalamud-based applications. This class integrates various plugin services and manages translation operations for different UI components.
member.remarks: The Echoglossian class is responsible for initializing and managing the plugin's configuration, handling commands, and registering UI overlays and translation handlers. It uses several Dalamud services to interact with the game client and perform translations. Ensure that all required services are properly initialized before using this class.
member.summary: Handles runtime refresh of mutable plugin configuration without requiring a full plugin reload.
General utility methods for the Echoglossian plugin.
A utility class for handling character sets used in translations.
A class that contains a dictionary of language information.
Provides DB-first background prefetch for canonical ActionDetail payloads.
Provides the live DB-first apply/runtime path for the ActionDetail and ItemDetail addons, including trait-aware ActionDetail handling.
Provides DB-first background prefetch for canonical ItemDetail payloads.
Handles the quest probe command used to inspect the complete quest data shape from Lumina, the live quest progress resolver, and the current QuestPlate database rows.
Handles bootstrap and teardown of the quest-toast runtime that hangs off instead of the addon-handler registrar.
Provides reusable DB-first background prefetch for action-adjacent reference-text sheets used by ActionMenu.
Provides DB-first background prefetch for canonical trait payloads.
Font handling helpers for the Echoglossian plugin.
Manages the registration and configuration of translation overlays.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.Echoglossian.FindQuestPlate(Echoglossian.EFCoreSqlite.Models.Journal.QuestPlate)
member.summary:
Finds and returns a QuestPlate from the database.
Lookup is content-aware: GameVersion is not used as a filter so that existing translations survive game patches. When a row is found and its matches the hash on the incoming plate, the translation is still valid. In that case the caller should call to bump the GameVersion field without retranslating. When the hashes differ (content changed in a patch), this method returns null, signalling that retranslation is needed. Rows with no stored hash (legacy rows) are treated as hash-mismatch and will be retranslated once so they gain a hash on the next save.
member.param: Formatted QuestPlate to be found in the database.
member.returns: The matching plate when translation is still valid, or null when a new translation run is required.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.Echoglossian.UpdateQuestPlateGameVersion(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Updates only the and of an existing row without touching any translated content. Call this when returned a non-null plate (content hash matched), meaning the existing translation is still valid but was stored under an older game version.
member.param: Primary key of the row to update.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.EFCoreSqlite.Migrations.AddQuestSheetFields
member.summary: Adds the quest text sheet name and structured translated-row columns to questplates.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.EFCoreSqlite.Migrations.AddSourceContentHash
member.summary: Adds the SourceContentHash column to questplates for content-aware retranslation detection: translations can be reused across game patches when the quest text has not changed.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.EFCoreSqlite.Migrations.AddCanonicalQuestRowPayloads
member.summary: Adds canonical row-keyed quest payload columns so questplates can persist the full resolved quest payload without collapsing repeated source text.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.EFCoreSqlite.Migrations.AddQuestCanonicalRowsColumn
member.summary: Adds the persisted canonical quest row payload column after the row-keyed quest payload migration so existing databases that already applied the earlier migration can converge safely.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.EFCoreSqlite.Migrations.AddCanonicalStringArrayPayloadFields
member.summary: Adds canonical structured payload fields to stringarraydatas so future DB-first schema-driven runtimes can persist semantic context without relying on the legacy blob-only contract.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.EFCoreSqlite.Migrations.RemodelActionAndItemTooltipTables
member.summary: Rebuilds action and item tooltip tables around canonical DB-first payloads.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.EFCoreSqlite.Migrations.AddTranslationFailureCache
member.summary: Adds a persistent exact-translation-failure cache so identical source/target/engine requests that already returned no result can be skipped in later sessions.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.EFCoreSqlite.Migrations.AddTranslationFailureOrigins
member.summary: Adds origin metadata to persisted translation failures without changing the exact-lookup key semantics.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.EFCoreSqlite.Migrations.AddGameWindowClassJobId
member.summary: Adds an optional class/job discriminator to persisted GameWindow rows so job-sensitive addons can scope their canonical payloads.

member.name: P:Echoglossian.EFCoreSqlite.Models.Journal.QuestPlate.SourceContentHash
member.summary: Gets or sets the content fingerprint of the quest's translatable rows (SEQ + TODO + SYSTEM) at the time the snapshot was last saved. Used to detect whether quest text actually changed between game patches so that translations can be reused without retranslating. A null or empty value means the row predates content-hash tracking and should be retranslated conservatively.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.LanguagesHandling.LanguageEngineSupport
member.summary:
Provides supported engine lists per language code, computed from vendor-verified language sets and your runtime engine ordering. Broad-coverage LLM engines (ChatGPT, DeepSeek, Gemini, OpenRouter, Ollama, LmStudio, Claude) are added to all languages.
Engine indices (must match your enginesList):
0 - Google
1 - DeepL
2 - ChatGPT
3 - YandexCloud
4 - GTranslate
5 - DeepSeek
6 - Ollama
7 - LibreTranslate
8 - Microsoft
9 - Amazon
10 - Gemini
11 - YandexPublic
12 - OpenRouter
13 - LmStudio
14 - Claude
- Vendor sets reflect their official language pages as of 2025-10-09. - GTranslate follows Google’s language set; we mirror Google for that engine. - LibreTranslate’s list can vary by instance; we use the canonical set exposed in docs. - Region normalization is applied per engine (e.g., pt-PT, pt-BR, zh-CN, zh-TW). - Manual-inclusion hook retains niche codes you already use (e.g., klingon, nqo).

member.name: F:Echoglossian.LanguagesHandling.LanguageEngineSupport.BroadCoverageLlms
member.summary: Engines treated as broadly multilingual (no fixed official "translation language" list). These are always added to every language.

member.name: F:Echoglossian.LanguagesHandling.LanguageEngineSupport.ManualInclusionsPerEngine
member.summary: Manual niche inclusions that you previously supported even if vendors don't formally list them. Key: engine index; Value: set of language codes (case-insensitive).

member.name: F:Echoglossian.LanguagesHandling.LanguageEngineSupport.VendorSets
member.summary: Vendor-official sets (case-insensitive) of supported language codes. These are curated here so we can compute per-language engine arrays deterministically and quickly at runtime.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.LanguagesHandling.LanguageEngineSupport.ApplySupportTo(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.Int32,Echoglossian.LanguagesHandling.LanguageInfo})
member.summary: Applies supported engine indices to each language in the provided dictionary. This uses vendor sets, per-engine normalization, LLM broad coverage, and manual inclusions.
member.param: Map: language ID → language info with a Code property.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.LanguagesHandling.LanguageEngineSupport.NormalizeCodeForEngine(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Produces normalization candidates for a language code per engine. This keeps regional variants consistent with vendor expectations (e.g., DeepL: pt-PT/pt-BR, Chinese variants).
member.param: The raw language code from LanguageInfo.Code.
member.returns: One or more candidate codes to test for support.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.LanguagesHandling.LanguageEngineSupport.GetGoogleCommonCodes
member.summary: Common Google/GTranslate codes we explicitly track; uncommon codes are still treated as supported.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.LanguagesHandling.LanguageEngineSupport.GetDeepLCodes
member.summary: DeepL supported languages (2025 set including Hebrew, Vietnamese, Thai, Indonesian, Chinese). Variants included where relevant (EN-GB/EN-US, PT-BR/PT-PT, ZH, etc.).

member.name: M:Echoglossian.LanguagesHandling.LanguageEngineSupport.GetMicrosoftCodes
member.summary: Microsoft Translator (Azure) language codes covering the plugin’s common set.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.LanguagesHandling.LanguageEngineSupport.GetAmazonCodes
member.summary: Amazon Translate supported codes (mainstream coverage used in your plugin).

member.name: M:Echoglossian.LanguagesHandling.LanguageEngineSupport.GetYandexCloudCodes
member.summary: Yandex Cloud Translate language codes (official list).

member.name: M:Echoglossian.LanguagesHandling.LanguageEngineSupport.GetLibreTranslateCodes
member.summary: LibreTranslate canonical codes (can vary per instance; upstream commonly lists these).

member.summary: Schedules a delayed BattleTalk state reset when the addon hides. BattleTalk briefly hides between timer ticks, so clearing immediately can make the overlay disappear before the same line is shown again. The delay intentionally spans the observed timer cadence so transient hides do not look like a logical end of the current line.
member.param: The lifecycle event that triggered the delayed reset.
The addon arguments associated with the hide event.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.AddonLifecycleExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering and removing logging listeners for key lifecycle events of add-ons using an add-on lifecycle manager.
member.remarks: These extension methods enable or disable logging for important phases in an add-on's lifecycle, such as setup, refresh, event reception, requested updates, and finalization. They are useful for monitoring and debugging add-on behavior without interfering with other event listeners. When debugging addon behavior, prefer this helper together with the addon structure probe instead of adding ad hoc logging inside feature handlers.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.AddonLifecycleExtensions.LogAddon(Dalamud.Plugin.Services.IAddonLifecycle,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{Dalamud.Game.Addon.Lifecycle.AddonEvent})
member.summary: Registers a logger as a listener for key lifecycle events of the specified addon.
member.remarks: This method attaches a logger to several important lifecycle events, enabling logging for setup, refresh, event reception, requested updates, and finalization phases of the addon. This can assist in monitoring and debugging addon behavior throughout its lifecycle.
member.param: The addon lifecycle manager used to register event listeners.
The name of the addon for which lifecycle event listeners are registered.
Optional lifecycle event set to log. Defaults to the full event set.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.AddonLifecycleExtensions.Logger(Dalamud.Game.Addon.Lifecycle.AddonEvent,Dalamud.Game.Addon.Lifecycle.AddonArgTypes.AddonArgs)
member.summary: Writes a debug log entry for the specified add-on event and its associated arguments.
member.param: The event type that triggered the logging operation.
The arguments containing details about the add-on, including its name and context.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.AddonLifecycleExtensions.UnLogAddon(Dalamud.Plugin.Services.IAddonLifecycle,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{Dalamud.Game.Addon.Lifecycle.AddonEvent})
member.summary: Removes logging event listeners for the specified add-on from the provided add-on lifecycle instance.
member.remarks: This method unregisters logging listeners for several key lifecycle events, ensuring that log output related to the specified add-on is no longer generated. Use this method when you want to stop logging activity for an add-on without affecting its other event listeners.
member.param: The add-on lifecycle instance from which logging event listeners will be removed. Cannot be null.
The name of the add-on whose logging event listeners are to be removed. Cannot be null or empty.
Optional lifecycle event set to unlog. Defaults to the full event set.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.AddonStructureProbe
member.summary: Provides a generic recursive addon probe for live UI inspection.
member.remarks: The traversal pattern is intentionally generic and was inspired by the recursive addon walk used in SimpleTweaksPlugin's UIDebug helper and the addon inspection approach used by HaselDebug. The goal here is to keep the probe passive, reusable, and focused on structural logging rather than a dedicated UI panel.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.DiagnosticTelemetryHelper
member.summary: Provides a narrow, reusable helper for investigation telemetry that should remain silent unless a caller explicitly opts in.
member.remarks: This helper is intentionally small: it only handles per-category throttling keyed by one stable signature and standardized log prefixes. It does not decide which state is worth observing or when diagnostics should be enabled for one feature.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.DiagnosticTelemetryHelper.#ctor(System.String,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The stable scope name that prefixes emitted log lines.
The default suppression interval applied when callers do not supply one explicitly.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.DiagnosticTelemetryHelper.Debug(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Emits one throttled debug log line for the specified category.
member.param: The stable signature used for suppression. When omitted, the message itself becomes the signature.
The optional suppression interval for repeated identical signatures.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.DiagnosticTelemetryHelper.Information(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Emits one throttled information log line for the specified category.
member.param: The stable signature used for suppression. When omitted, the message itself becomes the signature.
The optional suppression interval for repeated identical signatures.

member.summary: Emits one throttled warning log line for the specified category.
member.param: The stable signature used for suppression. When omitted, the message itself becomes the signature.
The optional suppression interval for repeated identical signatures.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.DiagnosticTelemetryHelper.TryBeginEmit(System.String,System.String,System.DateTime,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Determines whether one signature may be emitted now for the specified category and records the new suppression window when it may.
member.param: The optional suppression interval for repeated identical signatures.
member.returns: when the caller may emit the line now; otherwise .

member.name: M:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.DiagnosticTelemetryHelper.Reset(System.String)
member.summary: Clears tracked suppression state for one category or for all categories when none is specified.
member.param: The optional category to clear. When omitted, all categories are reset.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.DiagnosticTelemetryHelper.Emit(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Emits one throttled log line through the provided sink.
member.param: The stable signature used for suppression.
The optional suppression interval for repeated identical signatures.

member.summary: Resolves the effective cooldown for one telemetry emission.
member.returns: The effective cooldown to apply.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.NativeTextNodeLayoutHelper
member.summary: Shared helpers for native text-node replacement paths that need the game UI to wrap multi-line text and keep nearby background nodes in sync.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.NativeTextNodeLayoutHelper.CaptureLayoutSnapshot(FFXIVClientStructs.FFXIV.Component.GUI.AtkTextNode*,FFXIVClientStructs.FFXIV.Component.GUI.AtkResNode*,FFXIVClientStructs.FFXIV.Component.GUI.AtkResNode*,FFXIVClientStructs.FFXIV.Component.GUI.AtkResNode*)
member.summary: Captures the current text-node and container sizing so a later native replacement can grow the layout using inferred padding instead of fixed magic numbers.
member.param: The text node whose layout should be captured.
The main container node that visually owns the text node.
An optional secondary background node, such as a nine-grid.
An optional sibling node whose X position is anchored to the text width.
member.returns: The captured layout snapshot.

member.summary: Resolves the current wrap width that should be reused for a native text replacement.
member.param: The main container node that owns the text node.
member.returns: The preferred wrap width to preserve.

member.summary: Applies translated text to a node using the existing wrap width and the minimum multiline flags required for the game to recompute size.
member.param: The text node that should receive the translation.
The translated text to write back.
The width that should be preserved for wrapping.
member.returns: The measured size after the text replacement.

member.summary: Resizes the supplied container nodes using the text delta captured in a pre-replacement layout snapshot.
member.param: The layout captured before native replacement.
The measured text size after replacement.
The main visual container that should grow with the text.
An optional secondary background node, such as a nine-grid.
An optional sibling node whose X position should continue to track the text width.
Whether the helper may grow container widths when the wrapped text width exceeds the original layout.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.NativeUI.Helpers.NativeTextNodeLayoutHelper.TryResolveContainerNodes(FFXIVClientStructs.FFXIV.Component.GUI.AtkUnitBase*,FFXIVClientStructs.FFXIV.Component.GUI.AtkTextNode*,FFXIVClientStructs.FFXIV.Component.GUI.AtkResNode*@,FFXIVClientStructs.FFXIV.Component.GUI.AtkNineGridNode*@)
member.summary: Resolves the nearest component-backed container for a text node and the first nine-grid background nested inside that container.
member.param: The live addon that owns the text node.
Receives the primary container node that should grow with the text.
Receives the first nested nine-grid background node, when present.
member.returns: when at least one layout node was resolved; otherwise, .

member.summary: Applies translated text to a node and grows its wrapper chain plus the nearest nine-grid background using inferred padding from the current addon layout.

The text node receiving the translation.
The translated text to write back.
Whether wrapper widths may grow when the current wrap width is insufficient.

member.summary: Measures the current node size using the live node dimensions first and falling back to text draw size when the node has not been sized yet.

member.name: T:Echoglossian.QuestContentHash
member.summary:
Computes a stable content fingerprint for a quest text sheet snapshot. Used to detect whether a quest's translatable text actually changed between game patches so that translations can be reused without retranslating.
Hash input: all SEQ, TODO, and SYSTEM rows concatenated as "{key}={value}\n" pairs sorted by key. Result is the first 16 hex characters of the SHA-256 digest (64-bit fingerprint — sufficient for change detection, not a security primitive).

member.name: M:Echoglossian.QuestContentHash.Compute(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Echoglossian.QuestProgressEntry},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Echoglossian.QuestProgressEntry},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Echoglossian.QuestProgressEntry})
member.summary: Computes the content hash from classified quest text rows.
member.returns: A 16-character lowercase hex string fingerprint.

member.remarks: The cache-and-index shape follows the general Lumina usage pattern seen in several Practical Dalamud plugins, especially Critical-Impact projects that reuse IDataManager and ExcelSheet access instead of querying the sheet repeatedly.

member.summary: Resolves AWS credentials only from explicit desktop-safe sources and never probes EC2 instance metadata during plugin runtime.

member.exception: Thrown when no desktop-safe AWS credentials source is available.

member.summary: Synchronously translates the given text from source language to target language using AWS Translate.

member.summary: Asynchronously translates the given text from source language to target language using AWS Translate.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.Translators.ChatGPTTranslator.#ctor(Dalamud.Plugin.Services.IPluginLog,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.Translators.ChatGPTTranslator.Translate(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Translates the specified text from the source language to the target language.
member.param: The source language of the text.
The target language for the translation.
member.returns: The translated text.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.Translators.ChatGPTTranslator.TranslateAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Translates the specified text from the source language to the target language asynchronously.
member.param: The source language of the text.
The target language for the translation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous translation operation. The task result contains the translated text.

member.name: M:Echoglossian.Translators.ChatGPTTranslator.TranslateCoreAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Performs the actual OpenAI chat completion call for a single cache key. Concurrent callers for the same key share the same in-flight task.
member.param: The source language of the text.
The target language for the translation.
The normalized cache key for this request.
member.returns: The translated text, or a synthetic error placeholder.
